subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-03-16 in Paris
subcodes.first_line: The Americans are a satiated people who hunger--this in contrast to the Persians… The East has always been able, through the aid of a spiritual power, to withstand the West… In one of the cities between Canada and California, a certain cardinal… Ka'bu'l-Abhar was an Israelite who lived in the time of Mu'aviyyih
subcodes.first_line_orig: اهالی امریکا سیر گرسنهٴ‌اند بالعکس ایرانیها گرسنهٴ سیرند که در حال گرسنگی و احتیاج خود
subcodes.subjects: @the Christian clergy, @material and spiritual existence; two books, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @Christ; Christianity, @critique of Eastern values; culture, @critique of Western values; culture
